rules.description: Auto-approve V-7 preferred vendor PRs below $10,000
rules.source_excerpt: Preferred vendor V-7 purchase requisitions below $10,000 are pre-approved without review.

rules.description: Deny PRs exceeding emergency spend cap of $50,000
rules.source_excerpt: No purchase requisition may exceed the emergency spend cap of $50,000 without board sign-off.
